hooks.command: echo "[SYSTEM] Session started at $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M %Z'). Persistent recurring tasks are managed by the OS scheduler. Do not create duplicate /loop versions of heartbeat, distill-session, or promote unless explicitly asked for temporary session-scoped reminders."
osascript -e 'display notification "Agent needs your attention" with title "Agent" sound name "Glass"' 2>/dev/null || true

hooks.prompt: The conversation is about to be compacted. Before that happens, write a summary of this session to the daily log. Append to daily-logs/$(date '+%Y-%m-%d').md with a ## heading showing the current time. Include: 1) What was accomplished (3-5 bullets) 2) Any open threads or unfinished tasks 3) Key decisions made 4) Any preferences or patterns observed. Keep it under 200 words. Create the file if it doesn't exist — start with '# Daily Log — YYYY-MM-DD' header.

hooks.command: python3 .claude/scripts/index-daily-logs.py 2>/dev/null; echo 'Daily logs re-indexed after compaction.'
